title: uragoga remota
side_effects: Uragoga remota can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing stomach upset, nausea, and diarrhea in some individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue. In rare cases, improper use of uragoga remota may also cause allergic reactions, including skin rashes and itching. Additionally, it may interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions such as high blood pressure and diabetes.
